items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. Established in 1854, the Capucines handbag was named after the street in Paris where the first store opened and was introduced in 2013. Crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, it features a signature flap: the exterior displays the Monogram flower, while the interior reveals leather-covered letters. Dimensions: 31.5 x 20 x 11 cm
